name: JustCall Sales Dialer API
what_it_does: AI-powered sales dialer and cloud business phone platform with REST API — providing auto and power dialing, SMS and WhatsApp messaging, call coaching with AI transcription and scoring, CRM integration, and unified inbox for sales development teams.
use_cases: Automating outbound dialer campaign creation and contact list management via API
Pulling AI call transcripts and coaching scores for sales manager review
Logging calls and SMS automatically to CRM via JustCall webhook integration
Sending bulk SMS campaigns to prospect lists for outbound sales outreach
Querying call analytics for SDR team performance and coaching workflows
not_for: Inbound customer support contact center (use Aircall or Five9 for support focus)
Enterprise contact center with WFM requirements
Voice-only without SMS — JustCall strengths include SMS
best_when: A sales development team needs AI-powered dialing with call coaching, SMS sequencing, and tight CRM integration (Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive) at mid-market pricing.
avoid_when: You need a pure inbound support contact center, have no outbound sales motion, or need >1000 seat enterprise deployment.

auth.notes: API key and API secret from JustCall account. Passed as Authorization header (Base64 encoded key:secret) or as separate headers. V2 API uses api_key and api_secret headers directly. No OAuth2. Webhook for call, SMS, and voicemail events.

pricing.notes: Indian company (Gurugram). Founded 2016. Raised $20M+. 6,000+ companies. Strong in SMB and mid-market. AI coaching and transcription built-in. SMS and WhatsApp integration. 100+ CRM and tool integrations. Power dialer, auto dialer, predictive dialer options. Sales-first positioning.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API v2 for calls, contacts, texts, campaigns, and analytics. Key/secret header auth. Good developer documentation. V1 and V2 APIs coexist — use V2 for new integrations. AI transcripts available after call processing (async). SMS bulk sending has carrier compliance requirements.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Call reads idempotent. Contact reads idempotent by phone number. SMS reads idempotent by ID. Contact creation may create duplicates — deduplicate by phone number.
known_agent_gotchas: V1 and V2 APIs have different auth — use V2 (api_key/api_secret headers) for new work
AI transcripts are processed asynchronously — webhook notification or polling required
Bulk SMS requires carrier compliance (10DLC registration in US) — factor in registration delay
Call recordings require plan with recording feature enabled
Contact phone numbers must be in E.164 format for reliable deduplication

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR, HIPAA, and SOC2 compliant. US and EU data residency. Key/secret header auth (version 2). Call recordings and transcripts contain PII — implement secure access. TCPA compliance required for US outbound calling — implement consent management.
